name: laws-jp
description: Command-line tool and library for the Japanese government e-Gov Laws API. Fetch full statute text, look up specific articles, search 9,500+ statutes, and watch for amendments — all from the canonical government source.
author: Naoto Kudo <naoloop@gmail.com>

scripts.lint: node --check bin/laws-jp.js && node --check lib/egov-api.js && node --check lib/cache.js && node --check lib/toc.js && node --check lib/seed.js && node --check lib/article-diff.js
